title: Mushrooms & Mycelium
body:
This mod is currently unfinished and in beta. It adds one new type of mushroom - the oyster mushroom - and mushroom leather. You can use mushroom leather for almost everything you can normal leather.

Content
- Oyster mushrooms(found in forests) 
- Mushroom leather(make by putting three oyster mushrooms in the crafting table)
- Mushroom leather armor(make using both string and mushroom leather)

Coming Soon
- Puffball mushrooms
- Mushroom growing system
- And more
